# Millux Place Miami

239 SW 12th St Miami FL 33130

Millux Place is a boutique preconstruction condo-hotel development located at 239 SW 12th Street in the vibrant Brickell neighborhood of Miami. Rising 9 stories, Millux Place will feature 99 fully furnished and finished residences. Developed by Habitat Group in partnership with BI Group, and masterfully designed by architect Kobi Karp, the building blends retro-chic style with modern sophistication. The interiors are crafted with high-end finishes and custom Italian cabinetry, delivering a lifestyle that’s both elegant and turnkey. Millux Place is estimated to be completed in 2026.

Millux Place offers a diverse selection of open-concept residences, including studios, one-bedrooms, two-bedrooms, and three-bedroom layouts, with sizes ranging from 382 to 908 square feet (see [Millux Place floor plans](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/millux-place-miami-condos/floor-plans "Millux Place floor plans")). Each condo at Millux Place features energy-efficient, impact-resistant floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors, marble countertops, stainless steel appliances, frameless glass showers, in-unit washer and dryer, and glass-enclosed balconies. All residences come fully furnished and are approved for short-term rentals, making them ideal for both end-users and investors.

Millux Place boasts an impressive lineup of next-gen amenities, including a panoramic rooftop pool deck with poolside beach-style cabanas, summer kitchen and bar, rooftop fitness center, co-working lounge, and a ground-level restaurant. Residents will also enjoy 24-hour concierge service, valet parking, a secure package room, pet-friendly policies, EV charging stations, and on-site hospitality management. A dedicated shuttle provides transportation to Brickell City Centre and the beach, further elevating the convenience of urban living.

Ideally located in the heart of [Brickell](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/brickell-condos "Brickell"), Millux Place places residents within walking distance of top dining destinations such as Sexy Fish, Cipriani, and Komodo, and shopping at Brickell City Centre and Mary Brickell Village. Essentials like Publix, Whole Foods, and CVS are just minutes away, while cultural landmarks like Simpson Park and The Underline provide nearby green spaces. The development is also conveniently situated near the Metrorail and Metromover stations, with Downtown Miami, Key Biscayne, and Miami International Airport all accessible within a 10- to 15-minute drive.

## About

## Millux Place

_Turnkey, boutique-style living approved for daily rentals just moments from Brickell’s core._

Millux Place, part of The Habitat Collection launched by Habitat Group in collaboration with the BI Group, will be a vibrant new addition to Miami’s financial core, offering full rental flexibility. This boutique urban experience offers everyday tranquility paired with the pulse of big-city living.

Designed by Kobi Karp, the nine-story building delivers a modern take on retro-chic, defined by clean lines and subtle nods to nostalgia. Tailored for both residents and short-term guests, the mid-rise will include 99 fully finished and furnished luxury residences. Expect marble countertops, custom Italian cabinetry, frameless glass showers in the bathroom, and glass railing enclosed balconies. Units will span 428 to 905 square feet.

A rooftop leisure area takes center stage in this boutique building. Curated for connection, this social retreat will include an elegant pool area, a state-of-the-art gym, and a stunning lounge, all set against the backdrop of Miami’s iconic sunsets.

Approved for short-term rentals and supported by on-site hospitality management, Millux Place is the ideal address for hands-off investors and flexible lifestyle seekers.

Where is Millux Place?

Living at Millux Place Residences at Brickell means being steps from everything Brickell, including green spaces, office towers, and vibrant nightlife. From a Publix and the Brickell City Centre to The Underline and the Brightline Metrorail station, this walkable neighborhood puts convenience, culture, and connectivity at your doorstep. By car, Coconut Grove’s Regatta Harbour Marina and Downtown’s Kaseya Center will be 15 minutes away, and the Miami International Airport will be 20 minutes away.

Millux Place Residence Features:

- Floor plans from 428 to 905 square feet
- Choice of open-concept studios, one-, and two-bedroom residences
- Fully finished and furnished
- Short-term rentals permitted
- On-site hospitality management
- Marble countertops and stainless-steel appliances
- Custom Italian cabinetry
- Custom lighting design
- Bathroom featuring frameless glass showers and Italian cabinetry
- Glass railing enclosed balconies
- Energy-efficient, impact-resistant, floor-to-ceiling windows and doors
- Washer and dryer in every unit
- High-efficiency central air conditioning and heating system

Millux Place Amenities:

- Panoramic rooftop pool deck
- Poolside beach-style cabanas
- Summer kitchen and bar
- Rooftop fitness center
- Lounge and coworking areas
- Ground floor restaurant
- EV charging stations
- Secure package room
- Shuttle service to Brickell City Centre and beach
- 24-hour concierge and secure access control
- 24-hour valet parking
